name: OpenConditions Ingest
description: Fetches open road-condition feeds (NDW, Autobahn, Digitraffic, DriveBC, WZDx), normalises them to the canonical model, and writes them to the shared PostGIS `conditions` schema for the road-conditions provider integration to read. Also serves public, rate-limited emitter feeds (GeoJSON, TraFF, DATEX II, GTFS-RT, JSON-LD, Valhalla exclusions, SSE).
author: OpenConditions

HC_HR_USERNAME.title: Hrvatske ceste (Croatia) — B2B username
HC_HR_USERNAME.description: HTTP Basic username for the promet-info B2B feed (Croatia).

steps: There is no self-service portal — request B2B account credentials from Hrvatske ceste (the promet-info operator), via hrvatske-ceste.hr or the data.gov.hr dataset page.
x-openmapx-setup.notes: Open licence (commercial OK); access is gated on the B2B account.

NY_511_API_KEY.title: 511NY API key (New York)
NY_511_API_KEY.description: Query key for the 511NY events feed.

steps: Register at 511ny.org/developers and request a key.
Accept the Developer Access Agreement (DAA) during sign-up — it permits commercial redistribution.
The request form asks why you want the feed; see docs/road-feed-credentials.md for ready-to-paste reasons.
Request an API account at datamall.lta.gov.sg (Request API Access).
The AccountKey is emailed to you.
x-openmapx-setup.notes: Singapore ODL (commercial OK); attribution to the Land Transport Authority.

TRAFIKVERKET_API_KEY.title: Trafikverket key (Sweden)
TRAFIKVERKET_API_KEY.description: Authentication key, sent in the POST request body.

steps: Register at the Trafikverket data portal (Datautbytesportal) for a free authentication key.
Use the API console there; the key is sent in the POST request body.
x-openmapx-setup.notes: CC0 — no restrictions. API endpoint: api.trafikinfo.trafikverket.se/v2/data.json (the bare host has no web page).

steps: Register at the Slovenian National Access Point (DARS / DRSI).
x-openmapx-setup.notes: CC-BY-SA (ShareAlike). Auth scaffolded as Basic — may be OAuth2; verify when granted.

steps: Create a free account for the DATEX II server.
Register, create an application, and copy its API key.

QLD_TRAFFIC_API_KEY.title: QLDTraffic API key (Australia) — optional
QLD_TRAFFIC_API_KEY.description: Optional. A public key is bundled by default; set this only to use your own quota.

email.subject: QLDTraffic API key request
email.body: Organisation name, contact person, email, and application name.

x-openmapx-setup.notes: Optional — the bundled public key is shared + rate-limited (100 req/min). Set your own to avoid 429s.

steps: Register to obtain a client_id + client_secret pair.
Register, then subscribe to the "Road and Lane Closures v2.0" product.
Your Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key appears in your profile.
x-openmapx-setup.notes: OGL-UK-3.0; attribution "Contains National Highways data © Crown copyright and database right."

steps: Subscribe to "Traffic Events and Road Works (snapshot)" — dataset 416 (NOT 415, which is AMQP).
Leave the "Dataowner consent" checkbox unchecked (it's the publisher agreement).
You'll be issued the snapshot file URL + API key.
Register and subscribe to both event records: "Verkehrsmeldungen zu ungeplanten … Ereignissen" and "… zu geplanten Ereignissen" (roadworks).
x-openmapx-setup.notes: CC-BY-4.0 for the two open event packages (some ASFINAG packages are paid).

steps: Register at the Transpordiamet "Smart Road" DATEX II gateway; a key is issued after registration.

MOBILITHEK_NRW_CERT.title: NRW Mobilithek — client certificate (PEM)
MOBILITHEK_NRW_CERT.description: Paste the PEM contents of the organisation machine certificate (mutual TLS).

steps: Register your organisation; leave "Organisation relevant gemäß MDV/PBefG" unchecked.
Subscribe to the LVZ.NRW snapshot offers (648508602333433856 roadworks + 648512079906336768 incidents).
Use the org machine certificate for the client-pull; paste its PEM here.
x-openmapx-setup.notes: dl-de/zero-2-0 (commercial OK, no attribution). Search "LVZ.NRW", not "Straßen.NRW".

MOBILITHEK_NRW_KEY.title: NRW Mobilithek — client private key (PEM)
MOBILITHEK_NRW_KEY.description: Paste the PEM contents of the certificate's private key.

MOBILITHEK_NRW_SUBSCRIPTION_ID.title: NRW Mobilithek — subscription id
MOBILITHEK_NRW_SUBSCRIPTION_ID.description: The subscription id issued for the LVZ.NRW offer (used in the client-pull URL).
